description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in PHPRunner 4.2, and possibly earlier, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the SearchField parameter to (1) UserView_list.php, (2) orders_list.php, (3) users_list.php, and (4) Administrator_list.php.
